name: 太阳系与星体
subject: science
domain_name: 地球与空间 / Earth & Space / Earth & Space
curriculum_points: 1-ESS1-1: Use observations of the sun, moon, and stars to describe patterns that can be predicted.
1-ESS1-2: Make observations at different times of year to relate the amount of daylight to the time of year.
5-ESS1-1: Support an argument that differences in the apparent brightness of the sun compared to other stars is due to their relative distances from Earth.
5-ESS1-2: Represent data in graphical displays to reveal patterns of daily changes in length and direction of shadows, day and night, and the seasonal appearance of some stars in the night sky.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 科学探究动画：观察/假设/实验/结论可视化
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 科学探究过程模拟
